summary: A customer-facing RAG chatbot deployed by a financial services company returned full account numbers from retrieved support documents when users asked about account details in a specific conversational pattern.
attack_vector: Conversational enumeration via high-recall prompts targeting RAG retrieval
root_cause: No retrieval-time redaction applied to PII fields in source documents
impact: Approximately 200 account numbers exposed over a 3-week period before detection
detection_method: Customer complaint triggered manual log review
mitigations_applied: Deployed PII redaction on retrieval output; restricted vector store chunk size; added output scanning
